news.summary:
Beijing has promised to restore direct flights between the Chinese mainland and Taiwan following a visit by the leader of the main opposition party.
The 10-point measures, which also include a pledge to ease restrictions on individuals travelling to the island, were announced on Sunday as Kuomintang
